message:
refactor: Split functions.zig and ast.zig to meet 500-line limit

Agent 1 - Split functions.zig (582 → 5 lines):
- functions/generators.zig (434 lines) - Function/method codegen
- functions/self_analyzer.zig (73 lines) - Self-usage detection
- functions/param_analyzer.zig (83 lines) - Parameter analysis
- functions.zig (5 lines) - Re-exports

Agent 2 - Split ast.zig (523 → 17 lines):
- ast/core.zig (290 lines) - Core AST nodes
- ast/deinit.zig (233 lines) - AST cleanup logic
- ast/fstring.zig (20 lines) - F-string types
- ast.zig (17 lines) - Re-exports

Result:
- ✅ ZERO files over 500 lines
- ✅ Build successful
- ✅ Tests improved: 69 → 71 passing (+2)
- ✅ Clean module organization
- ✅ API compatibility maintained

All files now meet 500-line limit with logical separation
